ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death (if applicable) */,
  "primary_position" TEXT /* Primary position played by the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting hand (e.g., left, right, switch) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing hand (e.g., left, right) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the high school attended by the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* Name of the college attended by the player */,
  "professional_debut" TEXT /* Date of the player's professional debut */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Current salary of the player */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the current contract ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* League affiliation (e.g., NL, AL, MLB) */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (city or region) */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home park */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_surface" TEXT /* Type of surface in the home stadium */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the league was established */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo image */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "current_commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the current league commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "runner_up_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that was the runner-up */,
  "most_valuable_player_id" TEXT /* ID of the most valuable player of the season */,
  "batting_title_winner_id" TEXT /* ID of the player who won the batting title */,
  "pitching_title_winner_id" TEXT /* ID of the player who won the pitching title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team */,
  "homeruns" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in (RBIs) */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "earned_runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs allowed */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves (for pitchers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the affiliation (if applicable) */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the player's contract with the team */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "last_game_played" TEXT /* Date of the last game played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played at that position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_batting" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "homeruns" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in (RBIs) */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_pitching" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched */,
  "homeruns_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of home runs allowed */,
  "walks_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of walks allowed */,
  "strikeouts_per_nine_innings" REAL /* Number of strikeouts per nine innings */,
  "walks_plus_holds_per_nine_innings" REAL /* Walks plus holds per nine innings (WHIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., query, update, insert) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
